body_txt: A common occurrence in children's stories and comics is having a character be lifted off their feet and into the air by a bunch of helium balloons. A variation is to have them achieve lift with plain air balloons, even though that's even less plausible. In Speculative Fiction , it may involve a Living Gasbag . Some stories use Chinese Sky Lanterns to achieve lift rather than balloons. This is a Trope Examined by the MythBusters . See under "Live Action TV examples" below. Often ended by a Balloon-Bursting Bird . See also All Balloons Have Helium when a character simply blows up a balloon with their breath and it automatically floats. May be combined with Balloon of Doom if the balloons are Played for Horror . See our Useful Notes on airships for more information on how the real aircraft operate. Not to be mistaken for Balloon Belly .
